ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing For Filing Of A Petition For Final Distribution Or A Petition For Approval Of Report On Status Of Administration
Off Calendar May-05-2025 Continued To Jun-02-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

REPORT OF STATUS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Feb-03-2025 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances: Ulric Duverney appeared by zoom for Joan Andres.
Britta Peterson appeared by zoom for the post deceased son's estate.

Mr. Duverney stated that he doesn't need a corrected inventory and appraisal, that the oversight was his fault, and that the sole asset is the 50% interest in the SF property. Ms. Peterson stated that the appraisal amount was $289,200.00. Report of status of administration is ordered off calendar. Status on close is set for May 5, 2025 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: A. Datt. Deputy: Singh. Not reported.

REPORT OF STATUS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Dec-18-2024 Continued To Feb-03-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing For Filing Of A Petition For Final Distribution, Or A Petition For Approval Of Report On Status Of Administration
Off Calendar Oct-28-2024 Off Calendar

REPORT OF STATUS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Jul-29-2024 Off Calendar

ORDER OF STATUS HEARING
Off Calendar Jul-29-2024 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Ulric Duverney appeared by zoom for Joan Andres.
Britta Peterson appeared by zoom for the post deceased son's estate.

Mr. Duverney stated that it is his fault, that he filed a status report, but mistook the April 22nd status date as the hearing date, that the report was accepted, but the notice of hearing was not, and that he did not see the June hearing date. The court noted that the inventory and appraisal shows a 50% interest in the real property, that the petition shows a 25% interest in the property and asked Mr. Duverney how he plans to clarify the correct percentage amount. Mr. Duverney stated that he will probably have to get a surveyor and figure things out, that he is not involved in the post deceased son's estate and that there is another probate for the sister. Mrs. Peterson stated that she provided Mr. Duvernay with a title report and that the title report opens a lot of issues, but she does not think that a surveyor is needed. The order to appear/order to show cause is off calendar. The Petition for Approval of the Status Report is off calendar as the requested extension has passed. A status hearing for filing of a petition for final distribution, or a petition for approval of report on status of administration is set for October 28, 2024, at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Jaime. Not reported.

REPORT OF STATUS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Jun-17-2024 Continued To Jul-29-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

An Order to Appear will be issued to the Executor Joan F. Andres and the Attorney Ulric N. Duverney to appear on July 29, 2024 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to explain why they failed to appear and why the issues raised in the probate examiner's notes have not been cleared. An order to show cause re sanctions is also being issued for counsel to appear on July 29, 2024 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 and show cause as to why sanctions in the amount of $250.00 should not be imposed against him for failure to appear under CCP 128. The Petition to Approve Report on Status of Administration is also continued to that date.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Apr-22-2024 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Dec-18-2023 Continued To Apr-22-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances: Ulric Duverney appeared via zoom for Joan Andres (executor).

Mr. Duverney stated that there were a lot of roadblocks, that there is a petition filed in Contra Costa County Courts, and that the parties are giving up on selling the house to the widow. The matter is continued to April 22, 2024 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

The Court issues sanctions in the amount of $250.00 for failure to appear against Ulric Duverney payable within 10 days of the order.

Judge: Ross Moody. Clerk: Ateesh Datt. Deputy: Singh. Not reported.

MINI MINUTES:
No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

An Order to Appear and Order to Show Cause will be issued to Ulric Duverney (attorney) to appear on December 18, 2023 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to show cause as to why sanctions in the amount of $250.00 should not be imposed against him for failure to appear. Status on close of estate is also continued to that date.

Judge: Ross Moody: Clerk: A. Datt: Deputy: Prieto: Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Petition Re The Estate Of James Potasz
Off Calendar Jun-15-2022 Off Calendar

PROBATE ACCOUNTING STATUS PETITION
Off Calendar Apr-21-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Ulric Duverney, via Zoom, for Joan Andres, Executor.

The court advises counsel that it is ordering Ms. Andres to file a petition to probate James' estate to receive distribution from this estate. Counsel reports that sale of the real property is in the process and has not yet received any objections regarding the sale.

After additional discussion, the Status Petition is taken under submission. A Status of Petition RE the Estate of James Potasz is set for Jun-15-2022 at 9:00 am in Dept. 204. No appearance will be required on that date if a Petition for Probate is filed by Jun-08-2022.

Judge: Hon. Joseph Quinn. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Obitinalla. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Oct-27-2021 Off Calendar

PROBATE ACCOUNTING STATUS PETITION
Off Calendar Aug-11-2021 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Ulric Duverney, via ZOOM, for Joan Andres, Personal Representative.

At the outset, the court asks counsel why there has been a delay in filing a proof of service and submitting a proposed order to the court. Counsel advises that he was not aware of the date and time for the hearing. The court reminds counsel of his responsibility to monitor the court's register of actions to obtain that information.

After additional discussion, the Accounting Status is taken off calendar. A Status on Close of Estate is set for October 27, 2021, at 9:00 am in Department 204. Counsel is advised to file either a Petition for Approval of Status or a Petition for Final Distribution, no later than two weeks prior.

Judge: Hon. Joseph M. Quinn. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: R. Rosado. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Nov-04-2020 Continued To Dec-30-20 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Ulric Duverney, Esq., counsel for Joan Andres, Executor (appearing by video conference).

The Court queries counsel concerning the want of an Inventory and Appraisal and the want of either a Petition for Final Distribution or report on status and petition for additional time to administer the estate. In response, Mr. Duverney reports on the status of the principal estate asset (1/3 interest in real property currently occupied by the widow and minor children of the brother of the decedent) and the estate's efforts to forego eviction of the widow and children.

After further discussion, the Court continues the current matter to December 30, 2020 at 9:00 a.m. in Dept. 204. The required Inventory and Appraisal and a petition on status and request for additional time to administer the estate must be filed on or before December 23, 2020.

Judge: Hon. Joseph M. Quinn; Clerk: R. Michael Diles; Deputy: K. Kabasares; Reporter: Not Reported. (D204)
